[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / charColor

# Method: charColor()

## Call Signature

```ts
charColor(): TextmodeColor;
```

Current character color.

### Returns

[`TextmodeColor`](../../../namespaces/color/classes/TextmodeColor.md)

Current character color.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="charColor" encoded-code="" />

## Call Signature

```ts
charColor(gray, alpha?): void;
```

Set the character color using a grayscale value.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `gray` | `number` | Grayscale value (0-255) |
| `alpha?` | `number` | Optional alpha value (0-255) |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="charColor" encoded-code="" />

## Call Signature

```ts
charColor(
   r, 
   g, 
   b, 
   a?): void;
```

Set the character color using RGB(A) values.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `r` | `number` | Red component (0-255) |
| `g` | `number` | Green component (0-255) |
| `b` | `number` | Blue component (0-255) |
| `a?` | `number` | Optional alpha component (0-255) |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="charColor" encoded-code="_-IDgwID8gJ0hFWDogR09MRCcgOiAnSEVYOiBDWUFOJywgeCwgeSsrLCAxNDAsIDI1NSwgMTgwKTsKfSk7Cgp0LndpbmRvd1Jlc2l6ZWQoKCkgPT4gewoJdC5yZXNpemVDYW52YXMod2luZG93LmlubmVyV2lkdGgsIHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lckhlaWdodCk7Cn0pOw" />

## Call Signature

```ts
charColor(value): void;
```

Set the character color using a CSS string or TextmodeColor object.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | \| `string` \| [`TextmodeColor`](../../../namespaces/color/classes/TextmodeColor.md) | Hex string, `rgb()`/`rgba()` string, or an existing color object |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="charColor" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQuYmFja2dyb3VuZCg2LCAxMCwgMjIpOwoJY29uc3QgdXNlQSA9IE1hdGguZmxvb3IodC5mcmFtZUNvdW50IC8gNDUpICUgMiA9PT0gMDsKCWFjdGl2ZSA9IHVzZUEgPyAnY29sb3JBJyA6ICdjb2xvckInOwoJdC5jaGFyQ29sb3IodXNlQSA_-" />
